name: Plugin Request

## Plugin Name

<!-- What should the plugin be called? -->

## What It Does

<!-- Describe the plugin's purpose in 1-3 sentences. -->

## Use Case

<!-- Why do you need this? What workflow does it improve? -->

## Proposed Exports

<!-- List the functions and aliases you'd expect the plugin to provide. -->

**Functions:**
- `function_name` — does X

**Aliases:**
- `alias` → `function_name`

## Binary Dependencies

<!-- What binaries does this plugin require? e.g. kubectl, fzf, git -->

## Are You Willing to Build It?

- [ ] Yes, I can build this plugin (see [Plugin Authoring Guide](../../docs/plugin-authoring.md))
- [ ] No, I'm requesting someone else build it
